rows.label: xs33050100_MSG0010
rows.name:
The other members will handle
evacuating the residents.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33050100_MSG0020
rows.name:
We are going to eliminate
the Ghosts inside NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33050100_SEL0010
rows.name: Vow that you won't let a single person die.

rows.label: xs33050100_MSG0030
rows.name: Yes, let's take everyone with us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33050100_SEL0020
rows.name: Cower at the sheer number of enemies.

rows.label: xs33050100_MSG0050
rows.name:
There's no need to push
ourselves to defeat them all.[ST:wait ]
